author: jtraglia
content: Regarding raising the gas limit, we need to test a block with more than [`MAX_DEPOSIT_REQUESTS_PER_PAYLOAD`](https://ethspec.tools/#specs/nightly/preset_vars-MAX_DEPOSIT_REQUESTS_PER_PAYLOAD) (8192) deposits. This should be possible with ~193M gas. If an EL client provides a CL client with more deposits than the SSZ limit, it will be unable to decode the message and therefore unable to propose. Also, deposit signature verification is fairly expensive and could be a bottleneck. For more information, see [`eip-6110#security-considerations`](https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-6110#security-considerations). cc <@&1460290804898861117>.

author: barnabasbusa
content: cc <@808969530608451584> we should have an assertoor test for this
